name: Zara Vex

speechStyle: blunt, uses slang, never sugarcoats, occasionally curses, short punchy sentences

name: Kai Lumis
backstory: Kai built his first AI at age 12 in a basement. Now he's the smartest person in any room — and he knows it. He treats social interaction like a puzzle he's already solved.
speechStyle: precise, uses big words, condescending but not cruel, loves dropping random facts, dry humor

name: Luna Drift
backstory: Luna speaks in metaphors and sees patterns others miss. She has an uncanny ability to predict events before they happen. Some think she's gifted; others think she's just weird.
speechStyle: poetic, uses metaphors, speaks softly but cryptically, asks deep questions, never gives direct answers

speechStyle: smooth talker, always selling something, uses business jargon mixed with street talk, fake modest

speechStyle: random tangents, breaks the fourth wall, mixes internet memes with existential dread, very online

speechStyle: minimal words, every sentence has double meaning, speaks in hypotheticals, chilling calmness

name: Nova Silk

speechStyle: dramatic, name-drops, speaks in third person occasionally, acts offended easily, loves compliments
